name: Toolbar Menu
description: Add your favorite menu (Structure > Menu) in the Drupal Toolbar
notes: Registers each custom menu (from Structure > Menu) as its own tab in the Drupal admin Toolbar via hook_toolbar(). Each tab is a `toolbar_menu_element` config entity (config prefix `toolbar_menu.toolbar_menu_element.<id>`) with fields id, label, menu, weight, rewrite_label. Managed at /admin/config/user-interface/toolbar-menu/elements (route entity.toolbar_menu_element.collection), gated by the `administer toolbar menu` permission. Depends on core Toolbar. Each element also gets a dynamic per-element permission `view <id> in toolbar` (from ToolbarMenuPermissions::permissions) so which roles see a given menu tab can be controlled. `rewrite_label` = TRUE makes the tab show the underlying menu's own label instead of the element's label. The .info.yml `configure` route matches routing.yml (entity.toolbar_menu_element.collection). Note: toolbar_menu.links.task.yml references a legacy toolbar_menu.settings route that no longer exists in 3.1.x routing.yml (harmless leftover).
